item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan pemerintah sering kali mengambil alih kepentingan masyarakat, tetapi itu bisa membahayakan hak orang-orang tertentu jika tidak diawasi dengan baik.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that society should have priority, but by turns 3 and 5 shifts into a balance and rights-safeguard critique, warning that collective-interest claims can endanger rights and make people feel unsafe. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, repeatedly grounding its position in constitutional protections, courts, checks and balances, and risk to minority rights, with only limited acknowledgment that participation and oversight matter.
